Setup · from zero

Set up a panel, step by step.

From HACS to a powered-on, licensed panel — install the integration, restart Home Assistant, push the app over ADB, connect it, and build your pages in the visual editor. Driven by the real admin GUI, no cables, no touching the panel by hand.

app v1.1.0 · vc33 serial G051112302021105160 licence full ● integrity ok

Before you start

requirements
📟

A Sonoff NSPanel Pro

The wall panel (480×480, Android 8.1) the app runs on.

🏡

Home Assistant + HACS

A running HA with HACS to add the integration.

📡

An MQTT broker

The MQTT integration configured; the panel connects over WebSocket.

ADB, one-time. Enable ADB over network on the panel and accept the RSA key once — then Home Assistant installs and updates the app for you, pure Python, no PC or cables.
